projectDescription: A distributed web application for tracking cryptocurrency prices in real-time with historical charts, comparison tools, and linear regression analysis.
keyFeatures: Real-time cryptocurrency price tracking for 10 major cryptocurrencies
Historical price variation charts with customizable time ranges
Multi-cryptocurrency comparison with normalized price visualization
Linear regression analysis for price trend prediction
Distributed microservices architecture deployed on Google Cloud
MySQL database for historical data storage
Responsive web interface with live updates
publicApiSurface: GET /precios - Fetch current prices for all cryptocurrencies
GET /graficos-todas?horas={hours} - Generate charts for all cryptocurrencies
RecolectorPrecios - Background service that collects prices every 60 seconds
Supported cryptocurrencies: Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Solana, TRON, Dogecoin, Cardano, Hyperliquid, Bitcoin Cash, Chainlink
